docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY PATELCO CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT WILSON, RYAN E. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-29-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
